mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_cycle (child_id, owner_id, diagnosis_id, iep_id, seq, title, status) VALUES (#{childId}, #{ownerId}, #{diagnosisId}, #{iepId}, #{seq}, #{title}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, child_id, owner_id, diagnosis_id, iep_id, seq, title, status FROM training_cycle WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, child_id, owner_id, diagnosis_id, iep_id, seq, title, status FROM training_cycle WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY seq ASC
SELECT MAX(seq) FROM training_cycle WHERE child_id = #{childId}
SELECT id, child_id, owner_id, diagnosis_id, iep_id, seq, title, status FROM training_cycle WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND seq = #{seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE training_cycle SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE training_cycle SET iep_id = #{iepId} WHERE id = #{id}
